requirement: [Memory Monitoring & Diagnostics] Provide memory leak detection in debug mode

test_cases.description: Verify that memory leak detection is enabled in debug mode
test_cases.expected_result: Memory leak should be detected and reported

test_cases.description: Verify that memory leak detection is disabled in release mode
steps: Ensure memory leak detection feature is disabled
test_cases.expected_result: No memory leak should be reported

test_cases.description: Verify that memory leak detection threshold can be configured
steps: Set a specific memory leak detection threshold
Check if memory leak is detected
test_cases.expected_result: Memory leak should be detected when threshold is exceeded

test_cases.description: Evaluate the performance impact of memory leak detection feature
steps: Measure system performance with memory leak detection enabled
Allocate and free memory in a loop
Compare performance metrics with memory leak detection disabled
test_cases.expected_result: Performance impact should be within acceptable limits

test_cases.description: Test memory leak detection with extreme memory allocation scenarios
steps: Verify system behavior under extreme memory allocation
test_cases.expected_result: Memory leak detection should handle extreme cases gracefully
